description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a pink and white exterior, featuring a prominent front porch supported by columns and a fenced front yard. The house has a gabled roof with asphalt shingles and multiple symmetrically arranged windows with white trim. A detached garage sits to the right, connected by a paved driveway, and the backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and landscaped greenery. Mature trees flank the property, providing shade and privacy. The rear of the house reveals a brick chimney and additional garden space, while the side yard is bordered by a white picket fence and flower beds. The overall design blends traditional American residential elements with a welcoming, family-oriented layout.
description: A two-story pink and white suburban house with a gabled roof, front porch, detached garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a white picket fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, white picket fence, and symmetrical windows flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, paved driveway, backyard pool, and garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, garage, and more windows, with trees on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick chimney, pool, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch, white columns, steps, and decorative trim.
